description: Standard P&C analytical KPIs with formulas, required ontology concepts, and typical grain. Guides the Gold Data Product agent toward complete, industry-standard data products. Definitions are public industry knowledge.

kpis.name: Gross Written Premium
kpis.definition: Total premium written before reinsurance cessions.
kpis.notes: Report alongside NWP; distinguish direct vs assumed.

kpis.name: Net Written Premium
kpis.definition: Written premium net of reinsurance cessions.

kpis.name: Earned Premium
kpis.definition: Premium earned over expired coverage time in the period.
kpis.formula: SUM(earned_premium) via daily or monthly earning pattern
kpis.notes: Denominator for loss, LAE, and combined ratios.

kpis.name: Unearned Premium Reserve
kpis.definition: Written premium attributable to unexpired coverage.

kpis.name: Loss Ratio
kpis.definition: Incurred losses as a share of earned premium.
kpis.notes: State clearly whether LAE is included (loss+LAE ratio) and whether net or gross.

kpis.name: LAE Ratio
kpis.definition: Loss adjustment expenses as a share of earned premium.

kpis.name: Expense Ratio
kpis.definition: Underwriting expenses as a share of premium (written for trade basis, earned for statutory).
kpis.notes: Underwriting expense sits outside current ontology scope; requires finance source at scale-up.

kpis.name: Combined Ratio
kpis.definition: Overall underwriting profitability: loss + LAE + expense ratios.

kpis.name: Claims Frequency
kpis.definition: Claim counts relative to exposure.
kpis.formula: claim_count / earned_exposure_units (or per policies in force)

kpis.name: Claims Severity
kpis.definition: Average incurred cost per claim.

kpis.name: Average Premium per Policy
kpis.definition: Written premium per policy in force or written.

kpis.name: Policy Retention Rate
kpis.definition: Share of expiring policies that renew.

kpis.name: Premium Renewal Retention
kpis.definition: Renewed premium as a share of expiring premium.

kpis.name: Quote-to-Bind (Hit) Ratio
kpis.definition: Share of quotes that convert to bound policies.

kpis.name: Policies In Force Growth
kpis.definition: Period-over-period change in policies in force.

kpis.name: Reserve Development
kpis.definition: Change in ultimate loss estimates for prior periods; favorable or adverse.
kpis.notes: Requires triangulated snapshots; plan history retention in Silver.

kpis.name: Recovery Ratio
kpis.definition: Subrogation and salvage recoveries as a share of paid losses.

kpis.name: Average Claim Cycle Time
kpis.definition: Average days from report to closure.
kpis.formula: AVG(closed_date - reported_date) for claims closed in period

kpis.name: Claim Closure Ratio
kpis.definition: Claims closed relative to claims opened in the period.

kpis.name: Billing Collection Rate
kpis.definition: Collected amounts as a share of billed amounts.

kpis.name: Delinquency Rate
kpis.definition: Share of accounts or amounts past due.

kpis.name: Cancellation Rate
kpis.definition: Share of in-force policies cancelled in the period, split insurer- vs insured-initiated.
